text.tspan: CODE MASSacre
@liuzhen9320 single-handedly deletes 332 lines of legacy Rust code. Cleanliness achieved.
HISTORIC MERGE
@liuzhen9320 drops ter 1.x bomb, replaces with tera 2.x in what devs call 'the update of the decade'
BURST DAY
@liuzhen9320 goes supernova on July 3rd: 17 commits in a single day. The other 6 days wonder what happened.
DEPENDENCY DROPPED
@liuzhen9320 updates tera crate to v2, proving once again that upgrades are better than rewrites
MINOR CHANGE
@liuzhen9320 touches just 2 files but deletes 332 lines. The art of surgical code removal.
DEV MODE
@liuzhen9320 works in silence, deletes in style. 11 commits, 332 lines gone, zero PRs opened this week
